item.title: Heliborne survey in Karnataka's Raichur sparks curiosity, concern among residents
item.description:
<![CDATA[Heliborne survey in Karnataka's Raichur sparks curiosity, concern among residents
Raichur
A heliborne survey by the Mines and Geology Department to detect rare mineral deposits has sparked curiosity and concern among residents in Raichur district, long known as the 'Land of Gold' for its contribution to the nation's gold production. The survey is being carried out over the Maliyabad forest area on the outskirts of the city, sources said.
Raichur is home to the Hutti Gold Mines, which produc...]]>

item.title: Raichur's Mineral Mystery: Helicopter Survey Ignites Debate
item.description:
<![CDATA[A heliborne survey to detect rare mineral deposits has stirred both curiosity and apprehension in Raichur district, historically known as the 'Land of Gold.' This initiative by the Department of Mines and Geology aims to identify valuable minerals while considering environmental and community impacts.
The survey encompasses the Maliyabad forest area and involves a Time Domain Electromagnetic and Magnetic Geophysical method. It is supervised by the Geological Survey Department from Bengaluru, co...]]>
item.author: Author

item.title: Honda Activa Price in Raichur
item.description:
<![CDATA[Q: What is the on road price of Honda Activa in Raichur?
The on road price of Honda Activa in Raichur is ₹ 96,505. This includes RTO charges of ₹ 10,875 and insurance cost of ₹ 7,001....]]>
